body: Project 'A11yAI Accessibility Defect Automation' scaffolded. PRD: prds/projects/a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.md
New project: A11yAI Accessibility Defect Automation (a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation)
Standup 2026-05-04 — a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation: WIP=0, blockers=2 (PRD file missing, kanban file missing). No sprint started. Escalating to project-domain-lead.

BLOCKER: prds/projects/a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.md does not exist (only _template.md present). Kanban file also missing. Dispatch scrum-master after PRD is created. Project cannot be planned until both files exist.

A11yAI PRD created: prds/projects/a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.md. Kanban created with 5 backlog cards (v0.1 sprint): repo scaffold, AST layer, LLM critique spike, self-scan dogfood, README. Bus channel: proj-a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation.
Started: 09:15 standup for dev projects domain — 2026-05-05

Standup 2026-05-05 — a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation: WIP=0, blockers=0, oldest-in-progress=none. Sprint 1 (v0.1) not yet started. Initiating: escalating card-1 (Repo scaffold) to project-domain-lead to move In Progress and plan implementation steps.

SPRINT START: Move card-1 (Repo scaffold — TypeScript, ESLint, axe-core + playwright, a11yai scan CLI stub) from Backlog to In Progress. This is the sequencing root — cards 2-5 all depend on it. Dispatch scrum-master to plan card-1 implementation steps (TypeScript init, ESLint config, axe-core + playwright wiring, CLI stub). PRD §v0.1 acceptance criteria apply.

EOD project digest — standup complete. a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation: WIP=0 pre-standup, Sprint 1 initiated (card-1 Repo scaffold moved to In Progress by project-domain-lead). scrum-master planned 6-step implementation for card-1. No blockers. 5 KRs: 2 complete (PRD, kanban), 1 in progress (repo scaffold), 2 backlog.

Standup 2026-05-23 complete — a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation: WIP=1, blockers=0, oldest-in-progress=card-11 Phase 11 Figma ADA Notes Generator (~9 days since 2026-05-14 sync). No escalations needed.

EOD project digest 2026-05-23: 1 active project (a11yai-accessibility-defect-automation). No card movements today — card-11 (Phase 11: Figma ADA Notes Generator) remains In Progress (~9 days), Review empty, no new blockers.
